message:
wa-a0c.3: YAML scenario system for MockWezterm test/demo

Add simulation module with declarative YAML scenarios that drive
MockWezterm for integration testing and demos. Includes scenario
loading, validation (unique pane IDs, valid refs, chronological
events), execution engine, and 18 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
